qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: items are stored in a sorted doubly linked list. For a delete operation, a pointer is provided to the record to be deleted. For a decrease-key operation, a pointer is provided to the record on which the operation is to be performed. An algorithm performs the following operations on the list in this

qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: Consider the C code fragment given below. typedef struct node { int data; node* next; } node; void join(node* m, node* n) { node* p = n; while(p->next != NULL) { p = p->next; } p->next = m;
